overview: This program is designed for an intermediate lifter with a goal of bulking. The setup is a body part split over 5 days per week, focusing on high volume and intensity for muscle growth. The program includes an accumulation phase, intensification phase, and a deload phase to ensure recovery and continued progress.
progression_rules: Utilize double progression: aim for the top of the rep range for all sets before increasing weight. RPE 6-8 for compounds, RIR 2-4. RPE 8-9 for isolation, RIR 1-3.

exercises.name: Cable Flyes
form_cues: Keep a slight bend in elbows

days.cooldown: Static stretching focusing on chest and triceps
days.notes: Focus on form and control, especially on isolation movements.

days.cooldown: Static stretching focusing on back and biceps
days.notes: Ensure full range of motion on all exercises.

days.cooldown: Static stretching focusing on legs
days.notes: Focus on maintaining form, especially on compound lifts.

days.cooldown: Static stretching focusing on shoulders and abs
days.notes: Maintain control and focus on the mind-muscle connection.

days.cooldown: Static stretching focusing on arms and calves
days.notes: Focus on squeezing the muscles and maintaining tension.
